senses.gloss: firmly established, deep-seated, firm, solid, stable
fixed domicile, fixed residence, fixed lodging
place of stability, of quiet, of rest, of permanence

etymology.text:
Derived from the active participle of اِسْتَقَرَّ (istaqarra, “to settle down”).

Derived from the passive participle and noun of place of the verb اِسْتَقَرَّ (istaqarra).
